items.title: Real Madrid close in on Silva signing- Saturday's gossip
items.summary: Real Madrid expect to complete Bernardo Silva signing, Bayern Munich confident of deal for Marcus Rashford, Manchester United win race to sign Mateus Fernandes.

items.title: Sinfield knighted as Donald, Scarratt, Murphy made OBEs
items.summary: Kevin Sinfield has been knighted in the King's Birthday Honours in recognition of his glittering rugby league career and subsequent fundraising exploits to aid research and support families affected by Motor Neurone Disease.

items.title: Six Lionesses made MBEs in King's Birthday Honours
items.summary: Kevin Sinfield has received a knighthood in the King's Birthday Honours while six of England's Euro 2025-winning squad have been made MBEs.

items.title: Rooney and Cann disagree on Bosnia goalkeeper incident
items.summary: Former assistant referee Darren Cann and Wayne Rooney disagree over the red card incident involving Bosnia-Herzegovina goalkeeper Nikola Vasilj, with Rooney arguing the goalkeeper should have been sent off for his challenge on Canada's Tani Oluwaseyi.

items.title: Six Lionesses set to be rewarded in King’s Birthday Honours list following unprecedented back-to-back Euro wins
items.summary: SIX Lionesses are among a star-studded line-up of sporting heroes getting gongs in the King’s Birthday Honours. items.summary: Rangers and RB Salzburg remain in talks to finalise a deal for Danny Röhl to join the Austrian Bundesliga club.

items.title: Partey denied entry to Canada for Ghana's World Cup opener
items.summary: Ghana midfielder Thomas Partey will miss his nation's first World Cup game in Toronto against Panama, after being denied entry to Canada.

items.title: Fans on concourses instead of in seats, claims Fifa
items.summary: Fifa says numerous empty seats were visible in the near-sell-out Group A match between South Korea and the Czech Republic because of fans remaining on concourses.

items.title: 'Toronto erupts' - Larin equalises for Canada
